heading: Disappearance
label: 1158 Disappearance
text: Where a veteran receiving compensation under this chapter disappears, the Secretary may pay the compensation otherwise payable to the veteran to such veteran’s spouse, children, and parents. Payments made to such spouse, child, or parent under the preceding sentence shall not exceed the amounts payable to each if the veteran had died from service-connected disability.
notes: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 358 of this title, (2)(E), substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 4(b)(1)1976— struck out “, in his discretion,” after “Administrator” and substituted “such veteran’s spouse” for “his wife” and “such spouse” for “a wife”.Pub. L. 94–4331959— substituted “a veteran” for “an incompetent veteran”.Pub. L. 86–212
Effective Date of 1976 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 94–433section 406 of Pub. L. 94–433section 1101 of this titleOct. 1, 1976
